description: Deterministic Oracle grading surface for comparing Lab prediction targets at T-n against realized truth at T.
purpose: This contract defines `prediction_reconciliation`, the first Oracle artifact. It is emitted by the deterministic equity diff layer before interpretive truth mapping. The artifact answers: what did Lab predict, what actually happened, and how large was the miss? It is deliberately factual and low-hallucination.

status.constraint: Exactly AVAILABLE when the artifact exists.

rows.constraint: Non-empty. Must cover every comparable STOCK or ETF prediction target from Lab CP2.

macro_rows.constraint: Optional. Present only when Oracle is grading an explicit macro prediction target that is deterministic and comparable.

summary.constraint: Must summarize row coverage, direction accuracy, and largest misses.

feed_health.constraint: Optional deterministic readiness block emitted by oracle_truth_diff_equity. Present when the tool can summarize subject/truth stock+ETF coverage for Lab CP2 prediction targets.
feed_health.semantics: Separates missing feed coverage from actual prediction failure before interpretive Oracle or Evolve stages read the reconciliation rows.

absolute_delta.constraint: Absolute difference between predicted_target_price and realized_truth_price.

percent_delta.constraint: Percent miss measured against predicted_target_price or subject_snapshot_price per tool implementation.

directional_correct.constraint: True when realized move matched prediction_direction.

rank.constraint: Optional stable ranking field for ordering largest misses or movers.

finance_forecast_extension.constraint: Optional additive field set used when rows are emitted by tools/finance/resolve_forecasts.py for finance_forecast_claim_v1 replay. These fields do not change the legacy Oracle equity-diff row contract.
finance_forecast_extension.semantics: Binds a row to an admitted finance forecast claim's event window, benchmark, and outcome basis so eval_replay can score the declared claim-level event rather than accidental member diagnostics.

truth_join_key.constraint: Stable finance truth join key from finance_forecast_claim_v1.truth_binding.

subject_as_of.constraint: Subject-time T-n boundary for the admitted claim.

horizon.constraint: Horizon label bound at CP1 admission.

benchmark.constraint: Benchmark id used for relative-return scoring.

event_type.constraint: Finance forecast event semantic, e.g. group_return_direction_vs_benchmark.

outcome_basis.constraint: Claim-level outcome basis, e.g. equal_weight_group_return_direction or mean_member_binary_hit.

benchmark_member_policy.constraint: Benchmark-as-member policy copied from the admitted claim so replay can prove truth rows describe the same outcome contract.

member_return.constraint: Resolved member return over event_start -> event_end.

benchmark_return.constraint: Resolved benchmark return over event_start -> event_end.

truth_quality_status.constraint: OK / degraded / stale-style status used by eval_replay data-quality refusals.

comparison_basis.constraint: Must say why this macro row is deterministic and comparable.

status.constraint: READY when every prediction target has subject and truth prices; DEGRADED when at least one but not all targets are comparable; BLOCKED when no deterministic equity target can be graded.

diagnostics.constraint: Human-readable deterministic reasons for DEGRADED or BLOCKED status.

required_rows: Every comparable STOCK target in Lab CP2 must appear exactly once.
Every comparable ETF target in Lab CP2 must appear exactly once.
coverage_rules.macro_rule: Macro rows appear only when there is an explicit deterministic macro prediction target.
hard_failures: Non-comparable target silently included as if deterministic

rules: This artifact is deterministic-first and should be produced without semantic blame.
Do not infer motive or causal mechanism inside rows.
Interpretive explanation belongs in realized_hindsight_brief or cp2_critique, not here.

oracle_truth_diff_equity.role: Primary emitter for comparable STOCK and ETF reconciliation rows.

oracle_truth_diff_macro.role: Optional emitter for explicitly comparable macro rows only.
